title: Remove duplicate schema copies per issue-043
description: Consolidate duplicate copies of verdict.schema.json and any other schema fragments that pi-workflows, pi-behavior-monitors, and pi-jit-agents currently carry independently. Canonical owner is pi-jit-agents; consumers import.
acceptance_criteria: Any other schema fragments duplicated across consumers are consolidated to their correct owner package
Consumers import schemas via the owner package's subpath exports
